name: ruby-fiber-local
title: ruby-fiber-local
summary: Provides a class-level mixin to make fiber local state easy
description:
Provides a class-level mixin to make fiber local state easy
A module to simplify fiber-local state.
.
- Easily access fiber-local state from a fiber.
- Default to shared thread-local state.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-fiber-local because Provides a class-level mixin to make fiber local state easy.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-fiber-local as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-fiber-local with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-fiber-local --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
